fields.catalog_id: stable identifier for unit catalog authority
fields.conversion_edges: static exact or approximate conversion edges
fields.symbols: alias map for exposed unit symbols
fields.units: map of UnitSymbol to unit descriptor

rules: active use required for unqualified lookup
conversion graph must be deterministic for static exact conversions
schema_notes: R49 unit catalog schema uses canonical required_fields and Stable Unit feature status; product support remains NOT_RUN.
